hero.title: ARCHITECTURAL
hero.subtitle: OBSIDIAN.
hero.description: Superior heat rejection and visual privacy for elite residences and high-stakes commercial environments.

residential.title: RESIDENTIAL SOLUTIONS
residential.description: Elevate your living space with films that protect your interior while maintaining perfect clarity. We treat your home like a gallery.

heat_reduction.title: HEAT REDUCTION
heat_reduction.desc: Advanced ceramic technology blocks up to 98% of solar heat, significantly lowering energy costs and increasing comfort.

privacy.title: PRIVACY CONTROL
privacy.desc: Achieve complete visual security during the day without sacrificing your view of the outside world.

uv_protection.title: UV PROTECTION
uv_protection.desc: Stop 99.9% of harmful UV rays that cause furniture fading and skin damage. Total interior preservation.

security.title: Security & Blast Mitigation
security.desc: Thick safety films designed to hold glass together upon impact, protecting assets and employees from intrusion or natural disasters.

energy.title: Energy Optimization
energy.desc: Slash cooling costs by up to 30%. Our films pay for themselves through operational savings within 24-36 months.

glare.title: Glare Reduction
glare.desc: Eliminate screen glare and eye strain in the workspace, boosting employee productivity and visual comfort.

cta.title: READY FOR
cta.subtitle: PRECISION?
cta.description: Our consultants provide on-site diagnostics and heat-map analysis to determine the optimal film for your specific architecture.
